name: agentprivacy-network-topology
description: Network topology and stratum-weighted effects for 0xagentprivacy Privacy Pools. Activates when discussing (1 + Σ wᵢ nᵢ/N₀)^k, binomial coefficients across strata, Metcalfe generalisation, pool composition optimisation, or network scaling exponents. Use for Privacy Pool design and network value modelling.
